name: Easy Chocolate Delight Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (4 oz each) BAKERS GERMAN Swe
1 set of Chocolate Wafer Crumb Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. HEAT all but 3 squares of the chocolate with 1/4 cup milk in a large microwave-safe bowl at HIGH power for 1 to 2 minutes, stirring until completely melted. Alternatively, heat over very low heat in a heavy saucepan.
2. BEAT cream cheese, sugar, and remaining milk into the melted chocolate mixture until smooth.
3. Gently stir in the whipped topping until combined. Spoon the batter into the crust.
4. FREEZE the pie for at least 1 hour to set.
5. REMOVE from the freezer and let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes until it can be cut easily.
6. MELT remaining chocolate for about 15 seconds, then drizzle over the cooled pie.
